data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for optional replacement/default mapping for new records.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for an optional replacement/default mapping for new records. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific implementation details or API responses that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case discusses the retirement of a status but lacks concrete evidence of how new records are mapped to replacements, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of optional replacement/default mapping for new records.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
